message:
Cleanup: remove unused config module

Remove the empty config module that was no longer being used anywhere
in the codebase.

Files removed:
- src/config/mod.rs (was just a placeholder module)

Files modified:
- src/lib.rs: Remove `pub mod config;` declaration

The config functionality was either never implemented or has been
superseded by other patterns:
- Environment variables are loaded via dotenvy::dotenv() in main()
- CLI options are handled via clap derive macros
- Runtime settings are passed through function parameters

Keeping dead code modules adds confusion and noise during code
exploration. Removing it aligns with the project's "no tech debt" policy.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +0,0 @@
-//! Configuration loading and management.
-//! Uses dotenvy pattern per AGENTS.md: load `.env` in main before reading env vars.
-
-pub struct AppConfig;
